query: What was my last cholesterol reading?
label: warm_P5.1
answer:
Your last cholesterol readings from April 5, 2026 were:

Total Cholesterol: 237 mg/dL (elevated)
LDL: 162 mg/dL (elevated — the "bad" cholesterol)
HDL: 38 mg/dL (low — the "good" cholesterol)
Triglycerides: 186 mg/dL (elevated)

These levels show your heart has extra work to do. The good news is you're already on blood pressure medication (Telmisartan and Amlodipine) and taking Aspirin, which help protect your heart.
Your doctor referred you to a cardiologist in early April — it's important to follow up with that appointment if you haven't already. Small changes to diet and activity can make a real difference alongside your medications.
Not medical advice — talk to your doctor before acting on this.
